title: Tepsu's Origins Reborn
description: A modpack to add some spice to a regular origins modpack.
body:
🟢 An origins modpack to add even more content to the game.

##  What Is This Modpack For?

This modpack aims to add more content to a regular origins world including mods like better end, better nether and several of YUNG's structure mods. There are also several client side mods that help with performance to make sure that the game cane run properly.

There are also a few other mods that make tools and armor easier to make or in some cases worse than usual!

## Does This Modpack Work On Servers?

Server compatibility hasn't been tested yet. From the mods used it in theory _should_ run on a server since it was built with server compatibility in mind.

## Current Versions & Planned versions

Current:
- 1.20.1 

Planned:
- 1.20.4

Update: Too many mods are not available pre 1.19, so all old versions will not get their own modpack. :(
